title: xanthocephalum dracunculoides
intro: Xanthocephalum dracunculoides, also known as yerba de tago or Mexican devil, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, derived from its essential oils and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Xanthocephalum dracunculoides include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Xanthocephalum dracunculoides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, and is often used in traditional medicine in Mexico and the southwestern United States.
